scripts.electron:build: npx @electron/rebuild --force --arch=x64 --version=40.6.0 && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs && npm run validate:native
scripts.electron:publish: npx @electron/rebuild --force --arch=x64 --version=40.6.0 && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish always
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-release.cjs && node scripts/validate-qntech-location-mapping.cjs && node scripts/validate-clean-server-boot.cjs && node scripts/validate-settings-persistence.cjs && node scripts/validate-board-html-security.cjs && node scripts/validate-local-api-security.cjs && node scripts/validate-credential-security.cjs && node scripts/validate-sqlite-protection.cjs && node scripts/validate-upload-security.cjs && node scripts/validate-api-route-inventory.cjs
scripts.release:safe: npm run clean:release && npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && npm run build && npm run validate && npm run validate:api && npm run electron:build && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
